results.title: Aristocrat says he lost $1.6M High Court divorce battle because he's 'too posh'
results.description: Sir Benjamin Slade, 80, faced a High Court showdown with former Lady Pauline Slade over her wish to sell Old Farm, a home valued at $784,868, on his sprawling 2,000-acre estate in Somerset

results.title: How much Dudley's 72 councillors are paid
results.description: Dudley Council has a brand new line-up with plenty of fresh faces after Reform UK took 22 seats on election night.

results.title: Pope says Church abuse 'still an open wound' as Spain trip begins
results.description: Pope Leo XIV on Saturday said sexual abuse within the Catholic Church remained "an open wound" as he began a trip to Spain that will include a meeting with victims.

results.title: Abigael Gikonyo rejects claims linking Linda Mwananchi movement to PRM party
results.description: Abigael Gikonyo, a prominent face of the Linda Mwananchi caravan, has pushed back against attempts to link the Nairobi Senator Edwin Sifuna-led movement to the People’s Renaissance Movement (PRM) party. Gikonyo’s remarks came in response to comments made by Sophia Mugure on Saturday, June 5, 2026, who is the PRM’s youth league leader and one [...]
